arts.ttl: 'As far as I'm aware': Ange Postecoglou now delivers Tottenham transfer update no Spurs fan would want to hear
Ange Postecoglou provides Cristian Romero injury update as Tottenham dealt fresh worry
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has admitted Tottenham defender Cristian Romero is "not ready" to make his return to the squad ahead of the Europa League clash against Hoffenheim. Djed Spence and Sergio Reguilon are not available for Thursday's clash as they were not named in Tottenham's Europa League squad back in September, while Antonin Kinsky won't be able to feature in Europe for Spurs until the knockout round of the competition .

arts.ttl: 'Spectacular': Pedro Porro says Tottenham have a 'real talent' in their ranks who he's always rated so highly
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur full-back Djed Spence has worked incredibly hard to become a valued member of Spurs’ squad this season. The Tottenham defender went from being a near-certainty...

arts.ttl: Tottenham star defends Ange Postecoglou & praises 'spectacular' teen duo
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Pedro Porro defends his under-fire manager Ange Postecoglou while reserving special praise for two of the club's brightest young stars.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports: Tottenham Set for Talks 'This Week' to Sign New Forward
arts.sum: Tottenham are expected to bolster Ange Postecoglou's attack amid Dominic Solanke's injury.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy and ENIC have confirmed 'long-term investment' at Tottenham as £35m paperwork filed
New Tottenham injury scare as two players return to training and a third who won't play
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's threadbare squad were put through their paces at the Enfield training complex and there were some returning faces, some missing ones and plenty of young players on display. Tottenham took to their Hotspur Way training pitches on Wednesday ahead of their flight to Germany to face Hoffenheim in the Europa League.

Supporters travelling to Liverpool Street post-match are reminded that Northumberland Park services have greater capacity to those at White Hart Lane and the journey time should be shorter, as there are fewer stops. Supporters are advised to use Northumberland Park if using Greater Anglia services as it is a shorter distance to the stadium than Tottenham Hale.

arts.ttl: Team News: Hoffenheim vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Hoffenheim and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Sources: Spurs among Premier League clubs contacted over defender who's one of Guardiola's 'favourite' players
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Tottenham Hotspur are among a number of Premier League clubs offered the chance to sign Barcelona’s Eric Garcia. Tottenham...
